converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cayuga Trails Club records
Cayuga Trails Club
Cayuga Trails Club (Title of work: Guide to trails of the Finger Lakes region..)
3833
3.4 cubic feet.
1 mapcase folders.
1957-2012. Ephemera, maps, publications Includes newsletters entitled CAYUGA TRAILS; membership lists; Executive Board minutes; committee annual reports; correspondence; committee materials; materials concerning hikes; maps; guide book, including the 1964 draft and the fifth edition, GUIDE TO TRAILS OF THE FINGER LAKES REGION, 1983; and other miscellaneous items of the Cayuga Trails Club, Ithaca, New York. Collection material in English 2069219
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Mary Warren
Date completed:
April 2001
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, June 2005
Date Modified:
Ben Wrubel, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes newsletters entitled CAYUGA TRAILS; membership lists; Executive Board minutes; committee annual reports; correspondence; committee materials; materials concerning hikes; maps; guide book, including the 1964 draft and the fifth edition, GUIDE TO TRAILS OF THE FINGER LAKES REGION, 1983; and other miscellaneous items of the Cayuga Trails Club, Ithaca, New York.
Cite As:
Cayuga Trails Club records, #3833. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Maps. Finger Lakes (N.Y.) -- Description and travel. Trails -- New York (State) -- Finger Lakes. Hiking -- New York (State) -- Finger Lakes. Cayuga trails.
